empty.body: Follow users, orgs, repositories, or the Daily Papers digest and updates will land here.

confirmClear.body: This permanently removes every notification from your Hugging Face inbox.

empty.body: Notifications from discussions, pull requests, and posts on the Hub will show up here.

signIn.body: Connect your Hugging Face account to sync the notification inbox from the Hub.

unauthorized.body: This access token can't read Hub notifications (a read-only or insufficient fine-grained token). Create a write or fine-grained token with notification access, or view them on the Hub.
unauthorized.title: Hub notifications unavailable
